reference: I am a forty-two-year-old female diagnosed with endometriosis two years ago and had a chocolate cyst which was removed by laparotomy. I have one child who is six years old and would like to have another. I currently have a Mirena intrauterine device, and my Anti-Müllerian Hormone level is zero point zero three. I have been advised to remove the Mirena and wait for my period. During my period, I will undergo a scan in which my ovaries will be checked. Please advise whether women with endometriosis can try for pregnancy at my age.
text: I am a 42-year-old female diagnosed with endometriosis two years ago. My doctor says to remove my laparotomy. I have one child and is planning to have another. I currently have a morina interferon device, and my anti-mullerian hormone level is zero point three. I have been advised to remove the morina and wait for my period. During my period, I will undergo a scan in which my ovaries will be checked. Please advise whether women with endometriosis can try for pregnancy at my age.
